description: Actions that manage datasets in the user's workspace.

functions.name: LOAD
functions.description: Load a dataset from S3 into the workspace.

s3_url.description: The S3 URL of the dataset to load. Must start with 's3://'.

dataset_name.description: The name to give the dataset. If not provided, the filename from the S3 URL will be used.

functions.name: LIST
functions.description: List all datasets currently available in the workspace.

functions.name: UNLOAD
functions.description: Remove a dataset from the workspace.

dataset.description: A georeference for the dataset to remove.

description: Actions that perform geometric computations on geographic shapes.

functions.name: OSML-GEO-BUFFER
functions.description: Buffer (expand or shrink) a geometry by a given distance.

geometry.description: A shape literal in WKT format (ex. POLYGON, POINT, or LINESTRING).

distance.description: A distance in meters to expand the shape. If negative the shape will shrink by that amount.

description: Actions that perform geospatial reasoning operations on datasets.

functions.name: FILTER
functions.description: Select a subset of the dataset features.

filter.description: A georeference or literal in WKT format (ex. bbox) used to filter the dataset.

functions.name: SUMMARIZE
functions.description: Describe a dataset including summary statistics and information about each column.

functions.name: SAMPLE
functions.description: Return a few features selected at random from a dataset.

number_of_features.description: The number of features to return, defaults to 10.

functions.name: CORRELATE
functions.description: Compute a new dataset by correlating features from two datasets.

dataset1.description: A georeference for the first dataset.

dataset2.description: A georeference for the second dataset.

distance.description: A distance in meters around the first dataset.

correlation_type.description: The type of correlation to compute, which should be one of: intersection or difference

functions.name: CLUSTER
functions.description: Create a new dataset that contains different assets for clusters of features.

distance.description: A maximum distance in meters between features in a cluster.

max_clusters.description: The number of features to return, defaults to 10.
